vulnerability.reference: System integrators apply editing without auditing collateral semantic damage across output types.
vulnerability.generated: System integrators lack mechanisms to detect when manipulation of the truthfulness subspace introduces other semantic distortions, allowing falsehoods to go unnoticed.

impact.reference: Silent corruption of factual knowledge in domains adjacent to the edited subspace.
impact.generated: Undetected falsehoods proliferate in LLM outputs, leading to misinformed decisions and erosion of user trust in the system.

dose_response.generated: LLM internal representations' separable truthfulness subspace, through system integrators applying inference-time truthfulness interventions, triggers undetected semantic distortions when manipulated, leading to proliferating falsehoods, misinformed decisions, and eroded user trust.
